name: cereusdb-js-internal
description: CereusDB — browser-side spatial SQL powered by Apache SedonaDB

scripts.test:minimal: CEREUSDB_PACKAGE=minimal vitest run tests/core.test.ts tests/ddl.test.ts tests/distance-join.test.ts tests/relation-join.test.ts tests/function-catalog.test.ts tests/geography.test.ts tests/knn.test.ts tests/random-geometry.test.ts

scripts.test:global: CEREUSDB_PACKAGE=global vitest run tests/core.test.ts tests/ddl.test.ts tests/distance-join.test.ts tests/relation-join.test.ts tests/function-catalog.test.ts tests/geography.test.ts tests/proj.test.ts tests/knn.test.ts tests/random-geometry.test.ts tests/s2.test.ts
scripts.test:full: CEREUSDB_PACKAGE=full vitest run tests/core.test.ts tests/ddl.test.ts tests/distance-join.test.ts tests/relation-join.test.ts tests/function-catalog.test.ts tests/geography.test.ts tests/proj.test.ts tests/knn.test.ts tests/random-geometry.test.ts tests/raster.test.ts tests/s2.test.ts
